t.t-elif: o and 'company_id' in o and o.company_id.sudo()

div.style: display: -webkit-box;display: flex;-webkit-box-pack: justify;-webkit-box-align: stretch;justify-content: space-between;align-items: stretch;
display:-webkit-box;display: flex;-webkit-box-pack: justify;-webkit-box-align: stretch;justify-content: space-between;align-items: stretch;

div.t-if: target.street or target.street2 or target.city or target.state_id.name or target.zip

t.t-foreach: rows_count + 1 if rows_count == len(active_ingredients) else rows_count

td.style: white-space: normal; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

td.t-attf-style: border-right: 1px solid black;{{'text-transform: capitalize;' if details[row].get('name') not in ['Approximate Chews', 'Each Chew Size', 'Serving Size', 'Jar size'] else '' }}
background-color:#effbf0;border-left: 1px solid black;{{'width: 166.01px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 169.41px!important;'}}
background-color:#effbf0;border-right: 1px solid black;{{'width: 167px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 165.8px!important;'}}
background-color:#ffffff;border-left: 1px solid black;{{'width: 166.01px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 169.41px!important;'}}
background-color:#ffffff;border-right: 1px solid black;{{'width: 167px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 165.8px!important;'}}
background: #050050;color:#b5ffc1;border-radius: 0 0 0 10px;border-left: 1px solid black;{{'width: 166.01px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 169.41px!important;'}}
background: #050050;color:#b5ffc1;border-radius: 0 0 10px 0;border-right: 1px solid black;{{'width: 167px!important;' if report_type == 'pdf' else 'width: 165.8px!important;'}}

div.p: Base ingredients:
Note:

t.t-value: sum([calc.discount_amount * calc.count_of_jars for calc in active_calculators])

div.style: page-break-before:always;display: -webkit-box; display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: justify; -webkit-box-align: start; justify-content: space-between;

div.p: Customer Consent

I, , the undersigned, hereby confirm that I have thoroughly reviewed and verified all details of my Quote with Best Practice Way LLC (hereinafter referred to as "the Manufacturer"). I acknowledge that I am solely responsible for ensuring the accuracy and completeness of all information provided, including but not limited to product formula, quantities, jar color and size, label finish, serving size, pricing, and any other specifications outlined in the Quote.

I confirm that I have had the opportunity to ask questions and receive satisfactory clarifications from the Manufacturer regarding any aspects of this Quote. I understand that once the Quote is signed and production begins, changes or reversals may not be possible, and any modifications requested thereafter may result in additional costs or delays, which I agree to cover.

By signing this confirmation, I accept full responsibility for verifying that the Quote reflects my intended requirements and agreed-upon terms. Any errors, omissions, or discrepancies not brought to the Manufacturer’s attention prior to this confirmation are my sole responsibility.

Quote Validity
This Quote is valid for 15 calendar days from the date of issue. After this period, pricing, availability, or other terms may be revised at the Manufacturer's discretion.

Storage Policy
Upon completion of production, the finished product will be stored free of charge for 30 calendar days. If the order is not picked up or scheduled for shipment within this period, the Client agrees that Best Practice Way LLC will apply a storage fee of $300 per pallet per month, which will be invoiced accordingly.
Custom Formula & Regulatory Compliance

For any product formulas that differ from the Manufacturer’s stock formulations in ingredient composition, dosage levels, or other modifications (hereinafter referred to as "Custom Formula"), the Client is solely responsible for verifying that such formulas are compliant and appropriate for the intended species under applicable pet supplement and feed regulations.
Before submitting a Custom Formula, the Client must review and confirm that all ingredients included in the formula meet at least one of the following regulatory criteria:

ul.li: Listed in the AAFCO Official Publication (OP) for the intended species.
Generally Recognized as Safe (GRAS) for the intended use.
Approved as a food additive by the U.S. FDA for that species.

div.p: The Client agrees to document internally that this review has been completed and to provide reasonable evidence or explanation upon request. The Manufacturer may request ingredient specifications or supporting information to assess basic safety, but does not independently verify regulatory status.
Return Policy

Once the product is shipped out, returns will not be accepted. Customers have the opportunity to inspect and verify the product prior to its release for shipping to ensure it meets their requirements. Any concerns or requests for adjustments should be communicated before the shipment is finalized. By approving the product for shipment, the customer acknowledges acceptance of the final product, and no returns will be processed thereafter.
Labeling, Claims and Compliance

The Client is solely responsible for ensuring that all product labeling, marketing claims, and packaging content comply with applicable federal, state, and industry standards. The Manufacturer does not provide regulatory review or approval of labeling or claims. Clients are strongly advised to seek independent label review services, such as through the National Animal Supplement Council (NASC), or a qualified regulatory consultant, before finalizing their labels.

The Manufacturer’s role is limited to producing the product in accordance with the formula and specifications provided by the Client. Regulatory compliance of Custom Formulas and product labeling remains the sole responsibility of the Client. The Client agrees to hold the Manufacturer harmless from any liability, enforcement action, or claim related to the composition, regulatory status, labeling, or marketing claims of Custom Formulas. The Manufacturer reserves the right to decline production of any Custom Formula deemed unsafe or clearly non-compliant.

Please review the information provided in the following links:
CVM GFI #235 - Current Good Manufacturing Practice Requirements for Food for Animals
CVM GFI #245 - Hazard Analysis and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Food for Animals
CVM GFI #246 - Hazard Analysis and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Food for Animals: Supply-Chain Program

This product is intended for supplemental feeding only in labeled animal species. These statements have not been evaluated by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or health condition in animals. Consult your veterinarian before use, especially if your pet has a known medical condition or is under medical supervision.

This Customer Consent and any guidance provided by the Manufacturer are informational in nature; the Client remains solely responsible for ensuring full product and label claims compliance with all applicable regulatory requirements.
Best Practice Way LLC is compliant with the following statements:
Allergy Disclaimer

Our products may be formulated with various ingredients containing FDA-recognized allergens (such as shellfish and soy) that may cause allergic reactions in sensitive individuals or pets. As an SQF-certified facility, product labels MUST have allergens listed plainly, either in the ingredient section or elsewhere on the label.

Pet owners should also be aware that handling the product could potentially result in an allergic reaction, including skin irritation or other symptoms. If the person handling the product or the pet has known allergies or sensitivities to specific ingredients, a doctor or veterinarian should be consulted before use.

div.style: page-break-before:always;display: -webkit-box; display: flex; -webkit-box-pack: justify; -webkit-box-align: start; justify-content: space-between;

div.p: Overrun Note

Please note that the final number of jars produced may vary by up to 10% more or less due to standard production adjustments. The final invoice will reflect this variance, and any adjustments will be made before the final payment is processed.
Payment Terms
A 50% upfront payment is due upon acceptance of this proposal. The remaining 50% is due upon completion and readiness of the order.
Electronic signatures are valid and enforced for all purposes outlined in this document.

div.style: width: 49%; border: 1px solid black; border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px 30px;
width: 49%; border: 1px solid black; border-radius: 20px; padding: 15px 30px;

td.style: width:50px; white-space: nowrap; padding-right: 0.5rem; vertical-align: middle;

div.p: Please retain a copy of this document for your records. Your signed confirmation indicates your agreement to the terms outlined above.

xpath.attribute: o.powder_calculator_ids.filtered( lambda calc: calc in o.allowed_calculators_ids)
o.powder_calculator_ids.filtered( lambda calc: calc in o.allowed_calculators_ids)
